Doom Agent

Setup Guide & Troubleshooting Reference

AnythingLLM + WSL2 + Node.js





1. Prerequisites

Before starting, make sure you have the following installed and configured:



WSL2 (Ubuntu) installed on Windows

Git installed inside WSL

Node.js v20 via nvm (NOT Windows Node.js — see fix below)

Yarn v1.22+ installed globally



⚠️  CRITICAL: Do NOT use the Windows Node.js inside WSL. This causes UNC path errors and breaks everything. Install Node.js natively inside WSL using nvm.



2. One-Time Setup

Run these steps only once when setting up the project for the first time.



1

Install Node.js in WSL (nvm)

Install nvm and Node.js 20 natively inside Ubuntu



curl -o- https://raw.githubusercontent.com/nvm-sh/nvm/v0.39.7/install.sh | bash

source ~/.bashrc

nvm install 20

nvm use 20

which node   # should show /home/<user>/.nvm/versions/node/...



2

Remove Windows Node from WSL PATH

Prevent WSL from using the Windows Node.js installation



Add this line to ~/.bashrc:

<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: doom_agent_setup_guide (1).docx
published: 3/18/2026, 2:31:58 PM
</document_metadata>

export PATH=$(echo "$PATH" | tr ':' '\n' | grep -v '/mnt/c/' | tr '\n' ':')

source ~/.bashrc



3

Install Yarn globally

AnythingLLM is a monorepo that uses yarn workspaces



npm install -g yarn



4

Navigate to project & install all dependencies

Run from the project root



cd /home/<user>/your-project/anything-llm

yarn install

cd server && yarn install && cd ..

cd frontend && yarn install && cd ..

PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true yarn install   # inside collector/



ℹ️  The collector installs Puppeteer which downloads a ~170MB Chromium browser. Use PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true to skip this if you don't need JavaScript-heavy web scraping.



5

Setup environment variables

Copy all .env example files



yarn setup:envs



6

Setup the database

Run Prisma migrations — must use Prisma v5, NOT v7



cd server

npm install prisma@5 @prisma/client@5 --legacy-peer-deps

npx prisma@5 migrate deploy

cd ..

<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: doom_agent_setup_guide (1).docx
published: 3/18/2026, 2:31:58 PM
</document_metadata>

cd ..



⚠️  npx prisma always fetches the latest version (v7) which is incompatible with AnythingLLM's schema. You must pin to v5.



3. Running the Application

You need 3 separate terminal windows — one for each service.



Terminal

Command

URL / Port

Terminal 1 (Server)

cd server && yarn dev

Backend API → port 3001

Terminal 2 (Frontend)

cd frontend && yarn dev

UI → http://localhost:3000

Terminal 3 (Collector)

cd collector && yarn dev

Document processor → port 8888



✅ Open http://localhost:3000 in your browser once all 3 are running. Port 3001 is the backend API only — it will show 'Not Found' if accessed directly.



4. Common Errors & Fixes

Every error encountered during setup and its solution:



Node.js / Path Issues



❌ Error

npm spawns cmd.exe and fails with UNC path error: \\wsl.localhost\Ubuntu\...

✅ Fix

WSL is using Windows Node.js. Install Node v20 via nvm inside WSL. Remove /mnt/c/ entries from PATH in ~/.bashrc.



❌ Error

<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: doom_agent_setup_guide (1).docx
published: 3/18/2026, 2:31:58 PM
</document_metadata>

❌ Error

'cross-env' is not recognized as internal or external command

✅ Fix

npm install -g cross-env



❌ Error

Error: spawn nodemon ENOENT

✅ Fix

npm install -g nodemon



❌ Error

Error: spawn vite ENOENT

✅ Fix

cd frontend && yarn install  (frontend deps were not installed)



❌ Error

Cannot find module 'dotenv'

✅ Fix

cd server && yarn install  (server deps were not installed)



Prisma / Database Issues



❌ Error

Prisma v7: 'url' property in schema.prisma is no longer supported

✅ Fix

npx always downloads latest Prisma. Pin to v5: npm install prisma@5 @prisma/client@5 --legacy-peer-deps, then use npx prisma@5



❌ Error

Table 'main.system_settings' does not exist in current database

✅ Fix

Migrations were never run. Run: cd server && npx prisma@5 migrate deploy



Zod / Package Issues



❌ Error

ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED: Package subpath './v3' not defined in zod/package.json

✅ Fix

<document_metadata>
sourceDocument: doom_agent_setup_guide (1).docx
published: 3/18/2026, 2:31:58 PM
</document_metadata>

✅ Fix

Old zod version installed. Run: npm install zod@3.23.8 --legacy-peer-deps, then rm -rf node_modules && npm install --legacy-peer-deps



yarn dev:all Issues



❌ Error

error Command 'dev:all' not found when run from server/ or frontend/ subfolder

✅ Fix

yarn dev:all must be run from the ROOT anything-llm folder, not from a subfolder. Use 3 separate terminals instead.



Puppeteer / Collector Issues



❌ Error

Puppeteer download takes 50+ minutes or hangs completely

✅ Fix

Kill with Ctrl+C, then: PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true yarn install inside the collector/ folder



5. Quick Reference



What

Command

Start server

cd server && yarn dev

Start frontend

cd frontend && yarn dev

Start collector

cd collector && yarn dev

Install all deps

yarn install (root) + yarn install in each subfolder

Setup .env files

yarn setup:envs (from root)

Run DB migrations

cd server && npx prisma@5 migrate deploy

Skip Puppeteer download

PUPPETEER_SKIP_DOWNLOAD=true yarn install
